rationale: At pinned HEAD 8b07e89f, C+B is coherent and empirically grounded. ApproveImpl calls exec.MergeBase("main", specBranch) at impl.go:249 before the future orphan scan and returns on error. FinalizeEpic iterates WorktreeOps.List(), filters bead/ branch entries at :385, and only then calls IsAncestor and MergeInto at :402; MergeInto propagates failure. BranchExists remains the simple bool rev-parse probe at gitops.go:94-100, while IsAncestor cleanly distinguishes exit 1 from infrastructure errors at :446-462. BranchExistsE and internal-Go show-ref have zero hits. AC11 and AC12 named tests are absent (both grep discriminators exit 1), so both are genuinely RED and pin the structural facts. The spec accurately states the three cleanly-signalled fail-closed legs, the probe-only fail-open exception, the audited refutation, ref-name tamper Non-Goal, deleted-branch behavior, and the future FinalizeEpic invariant. Impacted Domains excludes gitutil. Commit 8b07e89f itself changes spec.md only (15 insertions, 11 deletions); the broader f07cce6a range includes intervening review commits but does not undermine the reviewed spec revision.
